creator: erdgeist@erdgeist.org
text:
(In reply to ml from comment #7)

There's several things in need of fixing. E.g., the port delivery to basejail does not work anymore as it would now rely on an external git tool and I designed ezjail to not bring any dependencies besides what's in base.

But overall I still use it personally and it works so far. Need to verify agains 15.
